LanguageData.Ammo_Doom2016EmgMkVPistol.label: UAC EMG Cell
LanguageData.Ammo_Doom2016EmgMkVPistol.description: Plasma containment power cell developed by the Union Aerospace Corporation for directed-energy sidearms, utilizing the compression of Argent energy into a kinetic slug
LanguageData.Bullet_Doom2016EmgMkVPistol.label: EMG Bolt
